amendment.description: To prohibit an individual from acting as Director of National Intelligence if such individual is simultaneously serving as the head of any other Federal department or agency.

action.text: Amendment SA 5556 ruled out of order by the chair.
Motion to waive all budgetary discipline with respect to amendment SA 5556, not having achieved 60 votes in the affirmative, rejected in Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 49 - 49. Record Vote Number: 143.
Point of order that the amendment violates section 313(b)(1)(c) of the CBA raised in Senate with respect to amendment SA 5556.

Roll call votes on amendments in Senate: Motion to waive all budgetary discipline with respect to amendment SA 5556, not having achieved 60 votes in the affirmative, rejected in Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 49 - 49. Record Vote Number: 143.
